hotel_name: Hilton Garden Inn Hampton Coliseum Central

reviews.title: What is going on Hilton?
reviews.text:
The water in the lobby was only out occasionally, coffee was cold, and the staff upon check in was not helpful at all. 
I stay at Hiltons often and I must say that the room I was assigned here was a little disappointing, all of the furniture was cheap and dated, the shower had some issues working properly, vanity in the bathroom was falling apart. 
I felt like this was more along the lines of a hotel 6 rather than a Hilton.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Had to wait for a room to be available from 4:30-5:00pm, no comforters on bed

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Did not clean room every day had to get towels every thing was closed bar pool restaurant

reviews.title: I will never stay there again.
reviews.positives: I like the location of the hotel and the lobby area, and that’s it.
reviews.negatives: The room was cold, the temperature never rose above 67 degrees, and everything was outdated in the room to include the tv charging ports. The shower did not work, nor coffee machine.

reviews.title: Has a nice visit
reviews.text: One night stay.  It was hars to find parking spot close to doors.  Room was basically a hotel room but was clean and very quiet .  The proce was good.  I didnt like the fact it cost   $3 for bottles of water in the room and also $15 each for the breakfast buffet .  The buffet was nothing to write home about it was typical of what other hotels offer for free.  If I stay there again I will not pay for the breakfast.

reviews.title: Wouldn’t stay again unless I had no choice
reviews.negatives: Booked my room several weeks ahead and they gave me a room with 2 beds when I reserved a king. The clerk said they were sold out but I wasn’t told until last minute

reviews.title: Peacefull
reviews.text: I enjoyed my stay at the hotel. Did not get a chance to enjoy the amenities, but they were there at my convenience.

reviews.title: Horrible wouldn’t return !
reviews.positives: The only good thing was the front desk lady was very sweet and accommodating
reviews.negatives: The hot tub was out of order without notice and that’s one of the reason we booked here,the bath water was cold could barley even take a bath or shower,we never received our blankets after realizing our blankets were gross upon arriving and the staff were rude other the front desk lady she was very helpful and nice!

reviews.title: Helpful staff
reviews.text: Staff help and service was great

reviews.title: Horrible
reviews.negatives: Room was disgustingly dirty.   No one came to clean,take out garbage, replenish toilet paper nor bring clean towels.  Half the furniture in the room was broken.  Not a single machine in fitness center worked. The filter in the pool was barely working  and there were no towels in pool area any of the days we were there.

reviews.title: One of the best
reviews.text: This hotel offered clean accomodations even in the midst of this pandemic! Well maintained, process was easy, and staff extremely professional (especially Ms. Erica Banks!) Will definitely stay here again! Thank you.

reviews.title: Bad experience
reviews.negatives: Reservation was canceled with no notice no assistance

reviews.title: Amazing
reviews.text: The staff was amazing. The hotel is awesome, very clean, find is right inside . Clothing stores are literally in the back of the hotel.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: They are canceled for my reservation.
reviews.negatives: They didn't let me know and cancelation.

reviews.title: Expectations met!
reviews.text: Boyfriend came into town for Christmas and just needed quick accommodations. The pricing was reasonable, the staff was polite and professional, and the room was clean. The room was as described, very neat and comfortable. Would definitely recommend and wish we could have stayed longer.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Rooms were not cleaned properly housekeeping needs to be checked behind because they are not doing what they are supposed to do as far as cleaning

reviews.title: Great place & excellent location
reviews.text: This was the perfect location next to plenty of shopping and restaurants and not too far from Hampton University. Friendly staff and they have a breakfast buffet.

reviews.title: Fine
reviews.negatives: Had an issue with booking the room and took a while to get a new room

reviews.title: Place you want to be.....
reviews.text: Well managed environment, peaceful and friendly. A place to get away and enjoy the stay.
reviews.room_type: 1 KING MOBILITY ACCESSIBLE W/ ROLL IN SHOWER

reviews.title: The value wasn’t matching
reviews.negatives: The hotel was basic for the money paid . The room was basic nothing that gave this a nice room. We could have paid less and got a better looking room. Then they had a nerve to charge for basic breakfast that you get for free wasn’t nothing exciting about their buffet to make you even wanna pay same stuff you for free breakfast.  The hotel is just not giving the money spent . I definitely won’t be going back

reviews.title: Outstanding !!!!
reviews.text: Was highly impressed with the cleanliness and layout of the room. I have found my home-away from-home in Hampton.
reviews.room_type: 1 KING MOBILITY ACCESSIBLE W/ ROLL IN SHOWER

reviews.title: not to happy
reviews.negatives: housekeeping never came on a 3 day stay trash piled up on our room and saw staff everyday in the hall never checked our room and the showers were HORRIBLE no water pressure at all

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Great location. Very kind and caring staff

reviews.title: Accusations didn’t work.
reviews.positives: The woman at the front desk was nice.
reviews.negatives: I paid to stay at a nice hotel or at least I thought while I was getting in late and needed to leave at 4am the next morning. I just wanted a bed and a shower. The shower didn’t work. I feel that I should be reimbursed for this stay.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Hotel looks tired and needs a good clean. Housekeeping is by request only. Requested twice during our 5 day stay and did not show up. Had to go and get towels and toilet paper from reception myself.

reviews.title: I didn’t not enjoy my stay and will not stay at this hotel again
reviews.positives: The location and the cleaning staff
reviews.negatives: The walls were thin I could hear the tv and the person coughing next door in the middle of the night doors slamming people talking in the hallway cars speeding down the street, it was very difficult to sleep. Also I was in the none smoking section and my room and the hallway smelled like marijuana.
